'''zaratha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foetalization|foetalization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foetalization|foetalization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zaratha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæræthæth|zæræthæth]] || [[word:zæræthæj|zæræthæj]] || [[word:zæræthæsh|zæræthæsh]] || [[word:zæræthæ|zæræthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zararathath|zararathath]] || [[word:zararathaj|zararathaj]] || [[word:zararathash|zararathash]] || [[word:zararatha|zararatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zarathath|zarathath]] || [[word:zarathaj|zarathaj]] || [[word:zarathash|zarathash]] || [[word:zaratha|zaratha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zarafthath|zarafthath]] || [[word:zarafthaj|zarafthaj]] || [[word:zarafthash|zarafthash]] || [[word:zarafthaf|zarafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zarathatha|zarathatha]] || [[word:zarathaja|zarathaja]] || [[word:zarathasha|zarathasha]] || [[word:zarathaka|zarathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zarathath|zarathath]] || [[word:zarathaj|zarathaj]] || [[word:zarathash|zarathash]] || [[word:zaratha|zaratha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zarathathal|zarathathal]] || [[word:zarathajal|zarathajal]] || [[word:zarathashal|zarathashal]] || [[word:zarathakal|zarathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zarathathatha|zarathathatha]] || [[word:zarathajaja|zarathajaja]] || [[word:zarathashasha|zarathashasha]] || [[word:zarathaka|zarathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zarathathan|zarathathan]] || [[word:zarathajan|zarathajan]] || [[word:zarathashan|zarathashan]] || [[word:zarathakan|zarathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zarathathaoro|zarathathaoro]] || [[word:zarathajaoro|zarathajaoro]] || [[word:zarathashaoro|zarathashaoro]] || [[word:zarathakaoro|zarathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
